Diet_data_status: no diet share data in ESPAC; literature proxy attached from config

(https://www.thehaypillow.com/blogs/news/feeding-donkeys-straw-and-hay-q-a-with-the-donkey-sanctuary)

DFE_livestock_status: livestock DFE computed from YAML-configured Tier 1 factors
Animal_weight_normalization_note: Animal kg per 1 kg product expresses the live-weight biomass associated with 1 kg FPCM, calculated as total animal live weight divided by total milk output for the row, i.e. based on total head count rather than producing-head count.
Feed_mass_balance_note: Feed columns are constructed to satisfy: Pasture_feed_kg_per_1kg_product = Cultivated_pasture_feed_kg_per_1kg_product + Natural_pasture_feed_kg_per_1kg_product + Unmatched_pasture_feed_kg_per_1kg_product; and Total_feed_kg_per_1kg_product = Pasture_feed_kg_per_1kg_product + Supplement_feed_kg_per_1kg_product + Common_feed_kg_per_1kg_product + Waste_feed_kg_per_1kg_product + Unallocated_feed_kg_per_1kg_product.
Reference_output_basis_note: Milk liters/day converted to kg FPCM; live-weight-equivalent per kg FPCM is based on total herd live weight divided by total milk output; DFE annualizes this daily output by multiplying by 365.

(https://repositorio.uta.edu.ec/items/770d67bf-97e2-485a-8227-d941b7f4e1b2) | Effect of Mineral Supplementation on the Macromineral Concentration in Blood in Pre- and Postpartum Blackbelly Sheep - Reports 0.005 kg per animal per day mineral supplementation under free-grazing conditions in the Ecuadorian Amazon. Feed_mass_balance_note: Feed columns are constructed to satisfy: Pasture_feed_kg_per_1kg_product = Cultivated_pasture_feed_kg_per_1kg_product + Natural_pasture_feed_kg_per_1kg_product + Unmatched_pasture_feed_kg_per_1kg_product; and Total_feed_kg_per_1kg_product = Pasture_feed_kg_per_1kg_product + Supplement_feed_kg_per_1kg_product + Common_feed_kg_per_1kg_product + Waste_feed_kg_per_1kg_product + Unallocated_feed_kg_per_1kg_product.
Reference_output_basis_note: Milk liters/day converted to kg FPCM; live-weight-equivalent per kg FPCM is based on total herd live weight divided by total milk output; DFE annualizes this daily output by multiplying by 365.

Diet_data_status: no diet share data in ESPAC; literature proxy attached from config
Ration_composition_note: no diet/ration fields found in other livestock module; literature proxy diet attached from inputs/02-05_espac_lci_coefficients.yml
Diet_proxy_note: Derived as 2.0% of body weight in dry matter, using the midpoint of the 1.75% to 2.25% maintenance guideline for a representative 350 kg mule.
Diet_proxy_citations: Management recommendations for donkeys and mules - Ontario guidance gives 1.75% to 2.25% of body weight dry matter intake for maintenance in donkeys and mules; proxy uses the midpoint and a representative 350 kg body weight. (https://www.ontario.ca/page/management-recommendations-donkeys-and-mules)
DFE_livestock_status: livestock DFE computed from YAML-configured Tier 1 factors
Animal_weight_normalization_note: For live-animal products without a meat-output proxy, animal-live-weight-kg-per-kg-product columns are left blank. Use Representative_live_weight_kg as the animal weight reference.
Feed_mass_balance_note: Feed columns are constructed to satisfy: Pasture_feed_kg_per_1kg_product = Cultivated_pasture_feed_kg_per_1kg_product + Natural_pasture_feed_kg_per_1kg_product + Unmatched_pasture_feed_kg_per_1kg_product; and Total_feed_kg_per_1kg_product = Pasture_feed_kg_per_1kg_product + Supplement_feed_kg_per_1kg_product + Common_feed_kg_per_1kg_product + Waste_feed_kg_per_1kg_product + Unallocated_feed_kg_per_1kg_product.
Reference_output_basis_note: Animals_total_head multiplied by representative live weight to express kg live weight equivalent.

Diet_data_status: no diet share data in ESPAC; literature proxy attached from config
Ration_composition_note: no diet/ration fields found in ovine module; literature proxy diet attached from inputs/02-05_espac_lci_coefficients.yml
Diet_proxy_note: Composite Ecuador proxy. Total intake is based on an ovine feeding trial; tree-forage share comes from Acacia mearnsii voluntary intake; mineral intake comes from a Blackbelly sheep grazing study in the Ecuadorian Amazon.
Diet_proxy_citations: UTA thesis by Erika Esthefanía Lluay Guilcapi (bitstream 32507) - Reports voluntary dry matter intake of 1268.85 g/day in weaned sheep in Ecuador. (https://repositorio.uta.edu.ec/bitstream/123456789/32507/1/Tesis%20182%20Medicina%20Veterinaria%20y%20Zootecnia%20-Lluay%20Guilcapi%20Erika%20Esthefan%C3%ADa.pdf) | Evaluación de la preferencia de consumo de leguminosas arbóreas con potencial forrajero en rumiantes menores - Reports ovine Acacia mearnssi voluntary intake of 272.50 g/kg MS and 12.60 g/kg PV^0.75 at 60.44 kg live weight. (https://repositorio.uta.edu.ec/items/770d67bf-97e2-485a-8227-d941b7f4e1b2) | Effect of Mineral Supplementation on the Macromineral Concentration in Blood in Pre- and Postpartum Blackbelly Sheep - Reports 0.005 kg per animal per day mineral supplementation under free-grazing conditions in the Ecuadorian Amazon. (https://pmc.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/articles/PMC7401505/)
DFE_livestock_status: livestock DFE computed from YAML-configured Tier 1 factors
Animal_weight_normalization_note: Animal live-weight kg per 1 kg product expresses the standing animal biomass associated with 1 kg meat output, using representative live weight and a carcass-yield proxy for the row.
Feed_mass_balance_note: Feed columns are constructed to satisfy: Pasture_feed_kg_per_1kg_product = Cultivated_pasture_feed_kg_per_1kg_product + Natural_pasture_feed_kg_per_1kg_product + Unmatched_pasture_feed_kg_per_1kg_product; and Total_feed_kg_per_1kg_product = Pasture_feed_kg_per_1kg_product + Supplement_feed_kg_per_1kg_product + Common_feed_kg_per_1kg_product + Waste_feed_kg_per_1kg_product + Unallocated_feed_kg_per_1kg_product.
Reference_output_basis_note: Animals_total_head multiplied by representative live weight, then converted to estimated meat output with the configured carcass-yield proxy.

Diet_data_status: no diet share data in ESPAC; literature proxy attached from config
Ration_composition_note: no diet/ration fields found in ovine module; literature proxy diet attached from inputs/02-05_espac_lci_coefficients.yml
Diet_proxy_note: Composite Ecuador proxy. Total intake is based on an ovine feeding trial; tree-forage share comes from Acacia mearnsii voluntary intake; mineral intake comes from a Blackbelly sheep grazing study in the Ecuadorian Amazon.
Diet_proxy_citations: UTA thesis by Erika Esthefanía Lluay Guilcapi (bitstream 32507) - Reports voluntary dry matter intake of 1268.85 g/day in weaned sheep in Ecuador. (https://repositorio.uta.edu.ec/bitstream/123456789/32507/1/Tesis%20182%20Medicina%20Veterinaria%20y%20Zootecnia%20-Lluay%20Guilcapi%20Erika%20Esthefan%C3%ADa.pdf) | Evaluación de la preferencia de consumo de leguminosas arbóreas con potencial forrajero en rumiantes menores - Reports ovine Acacia mearnssi voluntary intake of 272.50 g/kg MS and 12.60 g/kg PV^0.75 at 60.44 kg live weight. (https://repositorio.uta.edu.ec/items/770d67bf-97e2-485a-8227-d941b7f4e1b2) | Effect of Mineral Supplementation on the Macromineral Concentration in Blood in Pre- and Postpartum Blackbelly Sheep - Reports 0.005 kg per animal per day mineral supplementation under free-grazing conditions in the Ecuadorian Amazon. (https://pmc.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/articles/PMC7401505/)
DFE_livestock_status: livestock DFE computed from YAML-configured Tier 1 factors
Animal_weight_normalization_note: Animal live-weight kg per 1 kg product expresses the standing animal biomass associated with 1 kg meat output, using representative live weight and a carcass-yield proxy for the row.
Feed_mass_balance_note: Feed columns are constructed to satisfy: Pasture_feed_kg_per_1kg_product = Cultivated_pasture_feed_kg_per_1kg_product + Natural_pasture_feed_kg_per_1kg_product + Unmatched_pasture_feed_kg_per_1kg_product; and Total_feed_kg_per_1kg_product = Pasture_feed_kg_per_1kg_product + Supplement_feed_kg_per_1kg_product + Common_feed_kg_per_1kg_product + Waste_feed_kg_per_1kg_product + Unallocated_feed_kg_per_1kg_product.
Reference_output_basis_note: Animals_total_head multiplied by representative live weight, then converted to estimated meat output with the configured carcass-yield proxy.

Ration_composition_note: no diet/ration fields found in other livestock module; literature proxy diet attached from inputs/02-05_espac_lci_coefficients.yml
Diet_proxy_note: Derived as 2.0% of body weight in dry matter, using the midpoint of the 1.75% to 2.25% maintenance guideline for a representative 180 kg donkey.
Diet_proxy_citations: Management recommendations for donkeys and mules - Ontario guidance gives 1.75% to 2.25% of body weight dry matter intake for maintenance in donkeys and mules; proxy uses the midpoint and a representative 180 kg body weight. (https://www.thehaypillow.com/blogs/news/feeding-donkeys-straw-and-hay-q-a-with-the-donkey-sanctuary)

Diet_data_status: no diet share data in ESPAC; literature proxy attached from config

Diet_proxy_note: Semipasture or free-range scavenging was not quantified in the source; proxy covers balanced feed only.
Diet_proxy_citations: Evaluación de parámetros productivos en crianza de gallinas criollas (gallina feliz). Patoa de Vallejo-Pujilí - Reports 0.081 ± 0.002 kg balanced feed per hen per day in a semipasture system in Cotopaxi. (https://repositorio.utc.edu.ec/handle/27000/7769)
DFE_livestock_status: livestock DFE computed from YAML-configured Tier 1 factors
Animal_weight_normalization_note: Animal kg per 1 kg product expresses the live-weight biomass associated with 1 kg shell eggs, calculated as total bird live weight divided by total egg output for the row, i.e. based on total head count rather than producing-head count.
Feed_mass_balance_note: Feed columns are constructed to satisfy: Pasture_feed_kg_per_1kg_product = Cultivated_pasture_feed_kg_per_1kg_product + Natural_pasture_feed_kg_per_1kg_product + Unmatched_pasture_feed_kg_per_1kg_product; and Total_feed_kg_per_1kg_product = Pasture_feed_kg_per_1kg_product + Supplement_feed_kg_per_1kg_product + Common_feed_kg_per_1kg_product + Waste_feed_kg_per_1kg_product + Unallocated_feed_kg_per_1kg_product.
Reference_output_basis_note: Egg counts converted to kg shell eggs; live-weight-equivalent per kg shell eggs is based on total flock live weight divided by total egg output.

DFE_livestock_status: livestock DFE computed from YAML-configured Tier 1 factors
Animal_weight_normalization_note: Animal kg per 1 kg product expresses the live-weight biomass associated with 1 kg FPCM, calculated as total animal live weight divided by total milk output for the row, i.e. based on total head count rather than producing-head count.

Feed_mass_balance_note: Feed columns are constructed to satisfy: Pasture_feed_kg_per_1kg_product = Cultivated_pasture_feed_kg_per_1kg_product + Natural_pasture_feed_kg_per_1kg_product + Unmatched_pasture_feed_kg_per_1kg_product; and Total_feed_kg_per_1kg_product = Pasture_feed_kg_per_1kg_product + Supplement_feed_kg_per_1kg_product + Common_feed_kg_per_1kg_product + Waste_feed_kg_per_1kg_product + Unallocated_feed_kg_per_1kg_product.
Reference_output_basis_note: Animals_total_head multiplied by representative live weight, then converted to estimated meat output with the configured carcass-yield proxy.
